creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: bsam
Date: Wed Sep 19 12:04:10 2012
New Revision: 304497
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/304497

Log:
  Add trytond_account_de_skr03 2.4.0, the SKR03 chart of account which is
  used in Germany.
  
  PR:		ports/171170
  Submitted by:	matthias@petermann.it

Added:
  head/german/trytond_account_de_skr03/
  head/german/trytond_account_de_skr03/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/german/trytond_account_de_skr03/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/german/trytond_account_de_skr03/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/german/trytond_account_de_skr03/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/german/Makefile

Modified: head/german/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/german/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 10:59:39 2012	(r304496)
+++ head/german/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 12:04:10 2012	(r304497)
@@ -45,6 +45,7 @@
     SUBDIR += selfhtml
     SUBDIR += steak
     SUBDIR += tipp10
+    SUBDIR += trytond_account_de_skr03
     SUBDIR += unix-connect
     SUBDIR += vtiger
     SUBDIR += webalizer2

Added: head/german/trytond_account_de_skr03/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/german/trytond_account_de_skr03/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 12:04:10 2012	(r304497)
@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+# Created by:	Matthias Petermann<matthias@petermann.it>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	trytond_account_de_skr03
+PORTVERSION=	2.4.0
+CATEGORIES=	german finance python
+MASTER_SITES=	http://downloads2.tryton.org/${PORTVERSION:R}/
+
+MAINTAINER=	matthias@petermann.it
+COMMENT=	The SKR03 chart of account which is used in Germany
+
+LICENSE=	GPLv3
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	trytond>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond \
+		trytond_account>=2.4.1:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_account
+
+USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/german/trytond_account_de_skr03/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/german/trytond_account_de_skr03/distinfo	Wed Sep 19 12:04:10 2012	(r304497)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (trytond_account_de_skr03-2.4.0.tar.gz) = ab1cbad3a85bcbbf8c2f0c2762a3ca820a901f97d2f404bd70c45307df8991cc
+SIZE (trytond_account_de_skr03-2.4.0.tar.gz) = 73105

Added: head/german/trytond_account_de_skr03/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/german/trytond_account_de_skr03/pkg-descr	Wed Sep 19 12:04:10 2012	(r304497)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+This module provides the SKR03 chart of account which is used in Germany.
+
+WWW: http://www.tryton.org/

Added: head/german/trytond_account_de_skr03/pkg-plist
==============================================================================

+++ head/german/trytond_account_de_skr03/pkg-plist	Wed Sep 19 12:04:10 2012	(r304497)
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
